{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Clearblood elixirs
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Clearblood elixirs]] are pills refined from unique herbs that remove impurities from the core and blood.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Clearblood elixirs]] increase the speed of a practitioner's cycling and prepare them for advancement.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
